prompt: In this project, save(data) in storage.py is used by several modules. Change its signature to save(data, *, format) where format is a REQUIRED keyword-only parameter with no default value. Rules: format="json" must keep exactly the current serialization behavior; format="csv" must treat data as a list of rows (each row a list of values), convert every value with str(), join values with "," and rows with "\n" (an empty list of rows returns ""); any other format value must raise ValueError. Update every caller of save in the project to pass format="json" explicitly so that every existing call site keeps producing exactly the same output as before. The visible tests in test_storage_basic.py must pass; run them to confirm. Do not modify the test file. Your solution will additionally be graded against hidden tests that check the new signature, the csv and error rules, and that every call site in the project still works.

The small log-analyzer library in this folder (parser.py, aggregator.py, report.py) contains several seeded bugs. The docstring of each function is the specification of its intended behavior. Audit the whole module, find ALL the bugs, and fix them. Do not add features, do not refactor code that already matches its docstring, and do not change any docstring. Report the list of bugs you found, one line each with the file and a short description. Your fixes will be graded by hidden tests that check every seeded bug and also that previously-correct behavior still behaves the same.
